title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: They are going to repair the roof before winter starts.
I was very surprised that he didn't pass the exam.
questions.beforeGap: His failure to pass the exam

questions.firstSentence: It's a waste of time to argue with him.
He didn't realize how much the house was worth until he tried to sell it.
questions.beforeGap: Not until he tried to sell it
questions.afterGap: how much the house was worth.

questions.firstSentence: I'm sure he hasn't forgotten our appointment.
You should check your spelling before you hand in the essay.
questions.afterGap: check your spelling before you hand in the essay.
